title: Crumble Topped Mediterranean Tart
description: A savory tart filled with the flavors of the Mediterranean and topped with a crunchy crumble.

ingredients.name: Mediterranean
ingredients.notes: chopped olives, artichoke hearts, and feta cheese

instructions: Roll out the salty tortilla and place it in a tart pan.
Mix together the Mediterranean ingredients and spread them evenly over the tortilla.
In a separate bowl, combine the flour and crumble. Mix until crumbly.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the Mediterranean filling.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
